productDisplayName: Fila Men Roller White Sports Shoes
description: fila brings to you Roller, the perfect mix of performance and sleek design. The herringbone pattern on the forefoot offers great grip, while the sleek uppers enhance the cool factor. Team these with jeans and t-shirts for casual outings.UpperSynthetic leather upper in a snakeskin patent leather look with metallic overlays for a sleek appearancePerforated toe upper for greater breathabilityCentral lacing system for a snug, customized FitHeavily padded collar and tongue for greater comfortBrand name embossed on the side, tongue and behind collarMidsoleSoft, cushioned footbed for all-day in-step comfortCushioned midsole for greater shock absorptionOutsoleMade of durable rubber in herringbone pattern on the forefoot and circular embedded lugs on the heel for great tractionBuilt up toe counter and heel counter for greater protection to the feetshoe careWipe with damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from direct sunlight
